author: y4rr
content: Result: Fixed XpuDevice::is_available() to probe wgpu adapter list for Intel GPU instead of assuming feature-compile-time means available. Implementation: under cfg(feature='wgpu'), uses catch_unwind(CubeRuntime::new(CubeDevice::Wgpu(0)).is_ok()) — returns false on WSL2/no-Intel-GPU box (adapter probe panics/errors), true only when a real adapter is successfully initialised. cascade_skip removed from xpu_is_available_matches_fixture in conformance_xpu.rs — test now runs live and passes (assert_eq!(false, false)). Pre-existing clippy::type_complexity in all_op_symbols_resolve suppressed with targeted allow + reason comment. cargo test -p ferrotorch-xpu --tests: 38/38 pass. cargo clippy -p ferrotorch-xpu --all-targets -- -D warnings: clean. Files changed: ferrotorch-xpu/src/lib.rs, ferrotorch-xpu/tests/conformance_xpu.rs.
